clause.title: Swimming pool access and water recirculation systems

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Barriers and fences for swimming pools are regulated by the Building Act 1975 (QLD), Building Regulation 2021 (QLD) and the Queensland Development Code MP 3.4 — Swimming pool barriers.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A swimming pool water recirculation system must incorporate safety measures to avoid entrapment of, or injury to a person.

callout.p: QLD G1P2 only applies to a swimming pool with a depth of water more than 300 mm. Barriers and fences for swimming pools are regulated by the Building Act 1975 (QLD), Building Regulation 2021 (QLD) and the Queensland Development Code MP 3.4 — Swimming pool barriers.
